title: KillrewardsX
description: A simple plugin for give players rewards when they kill other players
body:
A simple plugin for give players rewards when they kill other players.

When a player kills a other player then the console runs a command.
This command is fully customizable in config.yml
%player% = The Killer

Config.yml Example:

kill-command: "give %player% emerald 15"
gives the killer 15 emeralds
